languages.text: {n}Во всем чертоге, полном противоестественных творений ксеносов, ваш взгляд притягивает до боли знакомый объект — ваш собственный {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патент{/g}, выставленный словно экспонат... или насмешка над теми, у кого он был украден.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Во всем чертоге, полном противоестественных творений ксеносов, ваш взгляд притягивает до боли знакомый объект — ваш собственный {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патент{/g}, выставленный словно экспонат... или насмешка над теми, у кого он был украден.{/n}

languages.text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Во всем чертоге, полном противоестественных творений ксеносов, ваш взгляд притягивает до боли знакомый объект — ваш собственный {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патент{/g}, выставленный словно экспонат... или насмешка над теми, у кого он был украден.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

{n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your Warrant, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

{n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your Warrant, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En la sala repleta de sacrílegas creaciones xenos, tu mirada se posa sobre un objeto que te resulta muy familiar: tu {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}, expuesta como si fuese una pieza de museo... o una burla para provocar a su {mf|legítimo propietario|legítima propietaria}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En la sala repleta de sacrílegas creaciones xenos, tu mirada se posa sobre un objeto que te resulta muy familiar: tu {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}, expuesta como si fuese una pieza de museo... o una burla para provocar a su {mf|legítimo propietario|legítima propietaria}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}大厅里满是异形的诡异造物，可你的目光却被一件熟悉得令人心酸的物品吸引——你的{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}贸易授状{/g}，它像展品一样陈列着……或者说，更像是对它原本主人的嘲弄。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}大厅里满是异形的诡异造物，可你的目光却被一件熟悉得令人心酸的物品吸引——你的{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}贸易授状{/g}，它像展品一样陈列着……或者说，更像是对它原本主人的嘲弄。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dans cette salle remplie de créations xénos, un objet terriblement familier attire votre regard : votre {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}, exhibée comme une vulgaire pièce de collection... ou comme une provocation visant la personne à qui elle a été volée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans cette salle remplie de créations xénos, un objet terriblement familier attire votre regard : votre {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}, exhibée comme une vulgaire pièce de collection... ou comme une provocation visant la personne à qui elle a été volée.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bakışların, doğal olmayan zeno yaratımlarıyla dolu salonda dokunaklı derecede tanıdık bir nesneye takılıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatnamen{/g}, sergi parçası... Ya da çalındığı insanlarla alay eden bir şeymiş gibi sergileniyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bakışların, doğal olmayan zeno yaratımlarıyla dolu salonda dokunaklı derecede tanıdık bir nesneye takılıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatnamen{/g}, sergi parçası... Ya da çalındığı insanlarla alay eden bir şeymiş gibi sergileniyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}In der mit unnatürlichen Xenos-Kreationen gefüllten Halle fällt dein Blick auf einen vertrauten Gegenstand — deinen {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelsbrief{/g}, der wie ein Exponat ausgestellt ist ... gleichsam als Provokation der Bestohlenen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In der mit unnatürlichen Xenos-Kreationen gefüllten Halle fällt dein Blick auf einen vertrauten Gegenstand — deinen {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelsbrief{/g}, der wie ein Exponat ausgestellt ist ... gleichsam als Provokation der Bestohlenen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}異形の生み出し物で溢れるその大広間で、あなたの視線は、どこか切なくも懐かしい物に留まる。それは、あなたの{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}保証書{/g}。展示品のように、あるいは盗まれた者への挑発のように、そこに置かれている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the hall full of unnatural xenos creations, your gaze catches on a poignantly familiar object — your {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, put on display like an exhibition piece... or like a taunt to the people it was stolen from.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}異形の生み出し物で溢れるその大広間で、あなたの視線は、どこか切なくも懐かしい物に留まる。それは、あなたの{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}保証書{/g}。展示品のように、あるいは盗まれた者への挑発のように、そこに置かれている。{/n}
